englishDefinitions: Either salty or spicy, but not sweet.
persianTranslation: یا شور یا تند، اما شیرین نیست.
(به صورت مجازی) از نظر اخلاقی یا اخلاقی قابل قبول است.
examples: The fine restaurant presented an array of savory dishes; each was delicious.
The mushrooms, meat, bread, rice, peanuts and potatoes were all good savory foods.
The savory rabbit soup contrasted well with the sweet cucumber sandwiches with jam.
Readers are to be warned that quotations in this chapter contain some not so savory language.
